releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Flexible Model Selection & Customization by @glowingjade 
  * Add your own AI providers and models
  * Configure custom models for both chat and embeddings
  * Easily switch between different AI models
* New Providers Support by @glowingjade 
  * DeepSeek
  * OpenRouter
  * Azure OpenAI
  * LM Studio
* Embedding Database Management by @glowingjade 

## New Contributors
Special thanks to @chilang for o1 model support

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/glowingjade/obsidian-smart-composer/compare/1.0.12...1.1.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Added support for images in chat by @kevin-on in [#132](https://github.com/glowingjade/obsidian-smart-composer/pull/132)
* Implemented chat title editing functionality by @kevin-on in [#131](https://github.com/glowingjade/obsidian-smart-composer/pull/131)
* Enhanced search logic, resolving issue with folder prioritization for exact matches by @glowingjade in [#142](https://github.com/glowingjade/obsidian-smart-composer/pull/142)
* Increased default maximum tokens for Anthropic to 8192 by @kevin-on in [#137](https://github.com/glowingjade/obsidian-smart-composer/pull/137)
* Updated plugin icon to wand-sparkles by @kevin-on in [#140](https://github.com/glowingjade/obsidian-smart-composer/pull/140)

For a comprehensive list of changes, please refer to the [Full Changelog](https://github.com/glowingjade/obsidian-smart-composer/compare/1.0.7...1.0.8).

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* improve apply speed for gpt-4o-mini by 2~3x using OpenAI predicted outputs by @kevin-on in https://github.com/glowingjade/obsidian-smart-composer/pull/121
* support Gemini AI by @kevin-on in https://github.com/glowingjade/obsidian-smart-composer/pull/120
* support Gemini text-embedding-004 model by @kevin-on in https://github.com/glowingjade/obsidian-smart-composer/pull/122


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/glowingjade/obsidian-smart-composer/compare/1.0.6...1.0.7

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

* Added support for OpenAI-compatible APIs by @kevin-on in [#112](https://github.com/glowingjade/obsidian-smart-composer/pull/112)
* Added token usage tracking and a copy button for chat responses by @kevin-on in [#116](https://github.com/glowingjade/obsidian-smart-composer/pull/116)
* Display similarity search (RAG) results by @kevin-on in [#107](https://github.com/glowingjade/obsidian-smart-composer/pull/107)
* Implement display of similarity scores in search results (RAG) by @kevin-on in [#118](https://github.com/glowingjade/obsidian-smart-composer/pull/118)
* Added file exclusion patterns for RAG indexing by @kevin-on in [#111](https://github.com/glowingjade/obsidian-smart-composer/pull/111)
* Added a button to stop generation during AI responses by @kevin-on in [#109](https://github.com/glowingjade/obsidian-smart-composer/pull/109)

**Full Changelog**: [Compare Version 1.0.5 to 1.0.6](https://github.com/glowingjade/obsidian-smart-composer/compare/1.0.5...1.0.6)

* Implement rag prototpye by @KwanghyunOn in https://github.com/glowingjade/obsidian-smart-composer/pull/22
* show file preview on MentionableBadge & go to file on click by @glowingjade in https://github.com/glowingjade/obsidian-smart-composer/pull/31
* Handle zod validation error for invalid settings data by @KwanghyunOn in https://github.com/glowingjade/obsidian-smart-composer/pull/34
